component.name: Tuner
component.summary: Discover, stream, save your favorite Internet radio station

description.p: Make finding and listening to Internet radio station and music fun again!
Instead of showing all the stations you already know, Tuner presents you a new selection of stations from all over the world every time you hit the Shuffle button.
Tuner uses the community-driven station catalog radio-browser.info.

ul.li: Discover new stations every day
Star stations you like and visit their website
Control Tuner from your volume indicator

screenshot.caption: Tuner starred station with metadata and stream image
Tuner Jukebox playing, looking at saved search

ul.li: Station change crossfades
Icon animations
Refactored audio player and removed use of deprecated GstPlayer
Refactored metadata processing and title transitions
Starred Stations can now be ordered via Drag and Drop
Startup Jingle
Copy Stream Metadata to clipboard with a Right Click
Images in stream metadata are displayed in a frameless window
Titles can be Hearted in the play history
Exiting with Hearted Titles will prompt to save the list
Categories expansion is remembered
Refactored mucho
Removing translation of metadata
Refactored Elementary Granite library out as a module
Refactored namespaces
Fixed: play/stop buttons disabled #223
Fixed: Jukebox stops when tuning to a dead station #256
Disabled in-app language selection for non-debug and flatpak builds
Renamed the app to io.github.tuner_labs.tuner; see flathub issue #7468
Added 'en' into Language list as its the gettext default
Updated freedesktop platform from 24.08 to 25.08
Removed vala module as now included in freedesktop platform
Removed libsoup module as now included in freedesktop platform
Bumped libgee to 0.20.8
Sharpened some wording, fixed typos
Updated translated strings and incorporated fresh translations
Refactored Language change mechanism and applied translations to more UI elements
Refactored Icon layout and build, removing unused icon files
i18n - Broke out Country and Language translations to separate module
i18n - Added trad Chinese, Estonian, Romanian, Tamil and Latin American Spanish
Saved Searches - new feature
Explore Genres - new feature
Jukebox Shuffle - Play Random Station - new feature
New Default Genres added
Updated look and feel
Station and Stream History - new feature
More Station and Stream Metadata - new feature
Save, import Starred Stations to playlists - new feature
Faster responsiveness and image loading
New data provider API, plus better support for Radio Browser
Refactored for separation of concerns, OO, maintainability
Renamed, updated icons, description and screenshots per Flathub quality directives
Updated HTTP Session params to improve response
Increased Search re-fire interval to reduce number of concurrent searches
Made Search asynchronous so UI remains responsive during searches
Ignore request to load failing favicons URLs
Removed org.gnome.SettingsDaemon.MediaKeys from manifest per flathub
